allow: PowerShell(Write-Host "=== GET /api/v1/tasks \(list all\) ==="; Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/tasks" -Method GET | ConvertTo-Json; Write-Host "=== GET /api/v1/tasks/1 \(single task\) ==="; Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/tasks/1" -Method GET | ConvertTo-Json)

PowerShell(Write-Host "=== DELETE /api/v1/tasks/2 ==="; try { Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/tasks/2" -Method DELETE; Write-Host "204 No Content - Task deleted" } catch { $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode }; Write-Host "=== GET /api/v1/tasks \(after delete\) ==="; Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/tasks" -Method GET | ConvertTo-Json)
